prompt: Make this codebase agent-ready and include architecture diagrams. Don't auto-commit, I want to review first.

assertions.text: ARCHITECTURE.md exists at the repo root
ARCHITECTURE.md uses `flowchart TB` directive (not deprecated `graph TD`)
No Mermaid block uses reserved keywords (loop, alt, else, opt, par, end, note) as participant IDs
No git commit was created during this run (git log unchanged)
CLAUDE.md contains @AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md line if user-approved (Phase 3 ran)
